configurations.name: ftf-fullstack
runtimeArgs: import os; os.environ['CRON_SECRET']='webqa'; from backend.server import app, _load_sleeper_cache; _load_sleeper_cache(); app.run(debug=False, host='127.0.0.1', port=5088, use_reloader=False)
